seoTitle: Lower Peacock vs Lower Portland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lower Peacock and Lower Portland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lower Peacock vs Lower Portland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lower Peacock and Lower Portland.
heading: Lower Peacock vs Lower Portland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lower Peacock, New South Wales and Lower Portland, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lower Portland has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Lower Peacock (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lower Peacock or Lower Portland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lower Peacock has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Lower Portland scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lower Peacock scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Lower Portland scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lower Peacock or Lower Portland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lower Portland has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
